description: All‑in‑one marketing platform for agencies that includes CRM, funnel builder, email, SMS, voice, and automation workflows.
authentication: API key passed in the Authorization header (Bearer <API_KEY>)
self_serve: Yes – offers a free trial and self‑service sign‑up for agencies
api_surface: RESTful JSON API with endpoints for contacts, leads, campaigns, funnels, SMS, email, and workflow automation
buildability: Moderate – API is documented but lacks official SDKs; developers must build custom integrations
main_blocker: Limited API coverage and lack of official SDKs make integration development more time‑consuming
